source_description: Phase 3 of the Charter engineering EPIC (issue #461 / phase issue #465): a two-layer Charter Synthesizer pipeline. Deterministic orchestration (input normalization, target selection, artifact writing, provenance, project DRG layer, no-dangling-ref enforcement) wraps a narrow provider-agnostic LLM seam with fixture-backed tests. Tranche 1 covers WP3.1/3.2/3.6/3.7/3.8 and synthesizes project-local directives, tactics, and styleguides only. Topic-driven resynthesis uses structured selectors (DRG URN > kind+slug > interview section). Code-reading ingestion, URL fetching, free-text topic rewriting, and paradigms/procedures/toolguides synthesis are explicit non-goals for this tranche.
